body_axis.slight_tilt: primary axis tilted 5-15 degrees from vertical
body_axis.moderate_tilt: primary axis tilted 15-25 degrees from vertical
body_axis.dramatic_lean: primary axis tilted 25-45 degrees from vertical

limb_vectors.radial: limbs extending outward from torso center
limb_vectors.zigzag: alternating joint angles creating angular path

negative_space_shapes.triangle: three-sided void between limb and torso
negative_space_shapes.sliver: narrow elongated void between close limbs
negative_space_shapes.rectangle: regular void from straight limb arrangement

weight_distribution.asymmetric: strong weight bias to single support
weight_distribution.grounded_low: weight center dropped below normal standing

gaze_patterns.direct: gaze vector aligned with camera axis
gaze_patterns.oblique: gaze vector 15-45 degrees off camera axis
gaze_patterns.averted: gaze vector 45-90 degrees off camera axis

dynamic_indicators.gravitational: body responding to gravity beyond standing

surface_states.stretched: skin and muscle under tension, visible elongation
surface_states.compressed: tissue folded or compressed, crease visible
